chunks.text: Efficient Recursive Estimation of the Parameters of a Radar or Radio Astronomy Target (M110) by D.J. Sakrison. A Unified Theory of Synthesis with Unsymmetric Four-Element Lossless Lattices (M108) by C.W. Ho and I.T. Frisch. Simplification of the Integer Programming Formulation of the Covering Problem (M107) by M.A. Breuer. The Design of Circuits for Performing Operations and Computing Functions Over Finite Fields (M106) by Jean-Paul Jacob. The Generation of Threshold Nets By Integer Linear Programming (M105) by M.A. Breuer. A General Formulation of the Nyquist Criterion (M104) by C.A. Desoer. The Activation Energy of dc Electrical Conductivity of Ice Doped with HF and NH3 (M103) by S.Y. Chai and P.O. Vogelhut. Limiting Stable Currents in Bounded Electron and Ion Streams (M102) by W.B. Bridges, J.I. Frey and C.K. Birdsall. A Unified Theory of Synthesis with Unsymmetric Four-Element Lossless Lattices (M101) by C.W. Ho and I.T. Frisch. Certain Semiconductor Application of the Scanning Electron Microscope (M100) by T.E. Everhart.

Some Results in Stability Theory (M98) by C.A. Desoer. Electrical Dipole Inversion in Ruby Excited by a Coherent Light Source (M97) by I.F. Roberts. Analog Circuits for Energy and Fuel Optimal Control of Linear Discrete Systems (M95) by M.D. Canon and E. Polak. A Nonlinear Recursive Estimation Procedure and its Application to Certain Navigation Problems (M94) by D.J. Sakrison. Cross-Fielded Noise Studies: Guns and Transducers (M93) by A. Sasaki, N.R. Mantena and T. Van Duzer. Systematic Generation of Monostable and Counting Bistable Circuits (M92) by D.A. Hodges, D.O. Pederson and R.S. Pepper. Decision Making in Incompletely Known Stochastic Systems (M91) by J. Raviv. Self-consistent Field Theory of Linear and Nonlinear Crystalline Dielectrics Including Local Field Effects (M90) by A. Pine. A Mechanism for Internal Crowbarring of Rotating Plasmas (M89) by H.K. Forsen and A.W. Trivelpiece. Measurement of Synchrotron Radiation Spectrum (M88) by A.J. Lichtenberg, S. Sesnic and A.W. Trivelpiece.

A Novel Method of Semiconductor Device Measurements (M87) by T.E. Everhart, O.C. Wells and R.K. Matta. Capacity and Matched Signal of Quantum-Mechanical Channels (M86) by H. Takahasi. Report of a Visit to European Research Laboratories Active in Solid State Device Research and of the 1964 International Conference on the Physics of Semiconductors in Paris, France (M85) by R.S. Muller. Laser Induced Emission of Electrons, Ions, and Neutrals From Ti and Ti-D Surfaces (M84) by T.Y. Chang. Optimal Controls for Linear Systems and the Maximum Principle (M83) by Albert Chang. A General Formulation of the Total Square Integrals For Continuous Systems (M82) by E.I. Jury and A.G. Dewey. Instabilities in the Magnetization Vector in YIG at High Microwave Power Levels (M81) by G.E. Bodway and S. Wang. A Note on the Finite z-Transformation (M80) by E.I. Jury. On the Integral Equations of Thin Wire Antennas (M79) by K.K. Mei. Relationship Between the Total Square Integral Formula and the Stability Determinants (M78) by E.I. Jury and A.G. Dewey.

A Note on the Evaluation of the Total Square Integral (M77) by E.I. Jury. Efficient Recursive Estimation of the Parameters of a Covariance Function (M76) by David J. Sakrison. Propagation and Instabilities In Bounded Infinite Temperature Plasmas (M75) by A.J. Lichtenberg and J.S. Jayson. Analysis of A New Class of Pulse-Frequency Modulated Feedback Systems (M74) by T. Pavlidis and E.I. Jury. Anode Structures for Cold-Cathode High-Power Magnetrons (M73) by Yoshitaka Ikeda and Charles Susskind. Low Temperature Plasma Experiment For Study of High Temperature Plasma Instabilities (M72) by Charles K. Birdsall, Jack A. Byers and Tao Yuan Chang. Wave Mechanical Approach to the Nonlinear Theory of O-Type Traveling-Wave Tubes (M71) by K. Mouthaan. A Note on Counter-Examples to a Conjecture Concerning the Two-Armed Bandit (M70) by B. Gluss. Signal Design for Sequential Detection Systems (M69) by G.L. Turin. Equivalence of Time-Varying Systems (M68) by D.A. Calahan.

A Note on the Solution of a communication Jamming Problem of Root (M67) by Brian Gluss. A Fast Acting Valve Which Operates At Temperatures Up to 400 degrees celsius (M66) by H.K. Forsen. An Algebraic Characterization of Controllability (M65) by A. Chang. Electronic Aids for the Blind (M64) by Peter G. Shrager and Charles Susskind. A New Model For Simple Neural Nets and its Application in the Design of a Neural Oscillator (M63) by Theodosios Pavlidis. Synchronization Radiation Measurements From a Plasma In a Magnetic Mirror Machine (M62) by A.J. Lichtenberg, S. Sesnic, A.W. Trivelpiece and S.A. Colgate. Computer Generation of Equivalent Networks (M61) by D.A. Calahan. On the Absolute Stability of Sampled-Data Systems (M60) by E.I. Jury and B.W. Lee. Studies in Optimal System Theory (M59) by R.E. Mortensen. High-Performance Field-Effect Transistors Formed by Impurity Redistribution (M58) by D.A. Hodges.

Plasma Oscillations and Particle Trajectories in a Drifting Electron Stream; Palmer Diagrams (M57) by C.K. Birdsall. A sheet-current Plasma Model For Ion-Cyclotron Waves (M56) by A. Hasegawa and C.K. Birdsall. A Novel Method of Semiconductor Device Measurements (M55) by T.E. Everhart, O.C. Wells and R.K. Matta. Theoretical Admittance Variation With Frequency In Insulators Having Traps Subject to Charge Injection (M54) by Richard S. Muller. Techniques for the Simulation of Computer Logic (M53) by Melvin A. Breuer. Time-Varying Networks- The State Variables, Stability, and Energy Bounds (M52) by E.S. Kuh. A Resistance Heater for Semiconductor Wafer Processing (M51) by Ruth Talcott. Considerations regarding the Use of Semiconductors Heterojunctions for Laser Operation (M50) by S.C. Wang and C.C. Tseng. Optimal Control of Asynchronous Discrete-time Systems (M49) by B.W. Jordan and E. Polak. A Stability Criterion For Tunnel Diodes (M48) by I.T. Frisch.

Theory of a Class of Discrete Optimal Control Systems (M47) by B.W. Jordan and E. Polak. Neural Pulse Frequency Modulation Systems- II (M46) by T. Pavlidis. Hall-Effect Studies in Deposited CDS Thin Film (M45) by R.S. Miller and B.G. Watkins. The Machine Generation of Translators For Programming Languages (M44) by W.H. Wattenburg. A Note on the Absolute Stability of A Class of Nonlinear Sampled-Data Systems (M42) by E.I. Jury and B.W. Lee. A Limiting Case for Absolute Stability Criterion (M41) by E.I. Jury and B.W. Lee.
